variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 7079 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 7079 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 7079 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 7079 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 262.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 139.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 28.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 25.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 19.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P903552 Breather, Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7079
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P903552 Breather, Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7079
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P903552 Breather, Air is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 27 016 Positive Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7079
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 27 016 Positive Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7079
variants.description: Reliable crankcase ventilation filters from MANN-FILTER efficiently separate oil droplets from the blow-by gasses in the crankcase. This separation protects the intake system from contamination with oil and thus maintains its reliability.
specifications: Style: Positive Crankcase Ventilation, Dimension A: 262.0 mm, Dimension B: 139.0 mm, Dimension H: 25.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard CV50842 Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7079
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard CV50842 Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 7079
variants.description: Fleetguard® CV50842 crankcase ventilation unit features patented technologies that control oil drip and emissions with the highest oil and particle removal efficiency available.
